subject: A muscular warrior in armor powers up with an intense electric-blue energy aura, arms spread and body tensed in exertion
suspected_ip: Vegeta (Dragon Ball Super — Super Saiyan Blue form)
description: A heavily muscular armored warrior occupies the center of the frame in a wide mid-shot power-up pose, arms slightly spread and body angled forward. The figure's hair stands upright in a distinctive flame-like spike configuration. An intense electric-blue and gold energy aura radiates outward from the figure's body, creating dramatic light streaks across the composition. The armor is dark with a chest plate visible. The background dissolves into the aura's energy field, with teal and gold light trails filling the frame. The overall impression is one of maximum exertion and escalating power output.
foreground: armored warrior with spiked hair, arms spread in power-up stance
background: radiant energy aura with light trails dissolving into the frame
emotion: intense exertion, determination — body fully engaged, jaw set
